title: The Signal
description: The VLA detects a Massive Radio Burst from deep space. NASA and the U.S. government covertly dispatch space telescopes while launching a PR campaign for space exploration.

title: Middle East Ignites
description: Israel launches an offensive into Palestine, Lebanon, and Syria. Iran supports the opposition, turning the tide. Qatar joins the Palestinian side, causing further tensions.

title: Great Middle Eastern War
description: The Pan-Arabic Coalition pushes Israel to the brink. The U.S. forms a coalition with the UK, France, Turkey, Egypt, Jordan, and Iraq, sparking the Great Middle Eastern War.

title: Grass on Mars
description: The U.S. diverts resources to NASA, focusing on space stations and terraforming. Photos of grass on Mars go viral. Kyiv falls to Russia after a prolonged conflict.

title: Tehran Burns
description: The U.S. invades Tehran. Iran detonates a nuclear weapon, killing two U.S. divisions and countless civilians. The Pan-Arab Oil Coalition (PAOC) forms, controlling oil prices.

title: Europe in Crisis
description: Massive refugee crisis after the Middle Eastern war and the fall of Ukraine. Russia, China, and India deploy forces for leverage against the EU.

title: United Nations Reborn
description: Russia and China withdraw from Europe. A UN vote creates a centralized republic uniting Europe, India, and other countries, establishing the UN as a global superpower.

title: ABOL Discovered
description: NASA announces the discovery of planet ABOL in Proxima Centauri's habitable zone. The U.S. pitches LEAP (Leaving Earth Program). The UN agrees to a 10-year timeline.

title: Hope Campaign
description: The global 'Hope' PR campaign begins. Billionaire Oliver Espidoza promises cryosleep technology for the journey to ABOL.

title: The LEAP Act
description: The UN insists on governing ABOL. The LEAP Act gives the UN and private corporations the first wave of landings; national ships must wait two years.

title: Scouts Sent
description: Research ships from the UN, U.S., PAOC, and Russia confirm ABOL's viability. 1,000 explorers undertake covert missions with national goals.

title: First Wave Departs
description: 250,000 people depart Earth for the 30-year journey to ABOL.

title: Twin Moons Project
description: During the journey, the UN prepares military and scientific projects to enforce control of ABOL, including the Twin Moons super-soldier program.

title: Nuclear Exchange
description: India and Pakistan declare war, culminating in a nuclear exchange. The UN and PAOC make an energy deal in the aftermath.

title: Israel Struck
description: Rogue nukes strike Israel. The aftermath leads to global flooding predictions.

title: Global Conflict Escalates
description: India invades China with U.S. support. The refugee crisis worsens as PAOC and UN close their borders.

title: Second Wave Begins
description: 1 million people begin boarding corporate ships for ABOL. Passage promised in exchange for labor.

title: Second Wave Departs
description: The Second Wave departs Earth for ABOL.

title: Silent Beacons
description: The First Wave receives beacon signals from terraforming stations but no communication or signs of life from recon teams. Strong radioactive signals detected from the north pole.

title: Armed for Compliance
description: The UN reveals the Hope fleet carries experimental missiles and surface-to-orbit weapons to enforce the LEAP Act.

title: Landfall
description: The First Wave reaches ABOL. Russian vessels fire on the Hope but are overwhelmed. The UN lands in Cenriv I crater, establishes Ethron, and begins building a space elevator. No sign of the original recon teams.

title: Orbital Minefield
description: The UN deploys satellites -- secretly a minefield and sensor system to target national ships. American requests to search for missing pathfinders are denied.

title: The Betrayal
description: As national ships approach ABOL, the UN launches a surprise nuclear attack, decimating most fleets. A lone U.S. stealth ship escapes. The UN claims self-defense.

title: Ash and Cartels
description: Debris and ash storms kill hundreds. The Sabra cartel rises by smuggling supplies. IMPISI civil defense militias form. The underground Killwager betting game begins.

title: The SSSA
description: The UN introduces the Service, Settlement, and Security Act, redistributing land by meritocracy. Aristocrats get protected reserves; most live in crowded sprawl. Civilian weapons seized.

title: Yellow Revolution
description: A UN warning shot kills a girl in a yellow dress during protests in Ethron. Violence explodes. Thousands flee to the Scatter. IRAFEL rises, vowing to overthrow the UN.

title: Ibragim Hunts
description: The UN hires Ibragim (PAOC security wing) to hunt IRAFEL cells. IMPISI militiamen are killed. The UN forges body counts to maintain fear.

title: Gaia Rising
description: Pop star Gaia gains massive popularity with anti-UN songs. Her shows are outlawed, fueling her rise.

title: Second Landing War
description: The Second Wave reaches ABOL. Corporate ships negotiate with the UN; others are destroyed. Harlow Kinetic Solutions lands. The UN HQ in Ethron is bombed.

title: Espidoza Assassinated
description: Oliver Espidoza is assassinated. Investigation reveals the PAOC was behind it to seize northern mining sites. Survivors form an underground network and enter the Killwager.

title: Breath of God
description: A coalition uncovers the PAOC's geo-storm superweapon. Gaia sacrifices herself to destroy it, though its premature activation kills thousands.

title: Power Vacuum
description: Factions scramble to seize PAOC assets. The UN takes Sabra's base and secretly houses PAOC leadership on a space station.

title: The Headless Rise
description: James Vasquez and others form The Headless -- a confederation of independent cities and factions. A cold war begins between The Headless and the UN.

title: The Authority
description: The UN consolidates power and rebrands as The Authority, imposing martial law on newly acquired territories under the Great Authority Act.

title: Chimera Descends
description: The Chimera, a fanatical faction, descends from ABOL's moon and assaults Fort Hope at the space elevator base.

title: BLKOUT
description: Taskforce Boone arrives in system and begins their assault on ABOL, deploying multiple nuclear devices in a planet-wide EMP attack. BLKOUT begins.
